# st-alicloud_adb_db_cluster_lake_version_scaling_plan (Resource)

Manages an Elastic Scaling Plan for an existing Alicloud AnalyticDB for MySQL (ADB) data lakehouse edition cluster.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "st-alicloud_adb_db_cluster_lake_version_scaling_plan" "scaling_plan" {
  db_cluster_id       = "amv-wz9509beptiz****"
  elastic_plan_name   = "adb_scale_plan"
  type                = "EXECUTOR"
  enabled             = true
  resource_group_name = "resource_group"
  target_size         = "32ACU"
  cron_expression     = "0 20 14 * * ?"
  start_time          = "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"
  end_time            = "2025-12-31T23:59:59Z"
  auto_scale          = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `db_cluster_id` (String)
- `elastic_plan_name` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `type` (String)

### Optional

- `auto_scale` (Boolean)
- `cron_expression` (String)
- `end_time` (String)
- `resource_group_name` (String)
- `start_time` (String)
- `target_size` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

AnalyticDB scaling plans can be imported using the db_cluster_id, and the elastic_plan_name, e.g.

```terraform
terraform import 'st-alicloud_adb_db_cluster_lake_version_scaling_plan.scaling_plan' '<db_cluster_id>:elastic_plan_name'
```
